task:
ATOM 0 of the Doc Truth Analysis CODE-fix run (run_273). FOUNDER DECISION (binding, 2026-06-27): Option B — UNIVERSAL always-commit-and-flag across the WHOLE commit spine. There is NO hold-back lane anymore: every spine caller (verified-atom, ticket-close, oz-action, post-wrap support-commit, authoring-Play, repair) commits the whole changed set and FLAGS out-of-lane paths; nothing is ever withheld. The founder accepts that this retires the three daemon hold-back designs (oz-action reversible-only, the run_88/ticket-0053 support-commit guard, authoring-Play scope hold-back).

WHAT TO CHANGE:
1. REMOVE the now-dead `commitOnlyScope` field entirely. Prior runs already made it a global no-op; under Option B no caller needs it. FIRST run `grep -rn 'commitOnlyScope' packages/ scripts/` and enumerate EVERY site yourself — do not trust this list. KNOWN SITES (verify, do not assume complete):
   - core src: `CommitGateInput` (packages/core/src/commit-gate/gate.ts:28), `RepairCommitInput` + pass-through (packages/core/src/commit-gate/repair.ts:12,25), `CommitScopedOptions` (packages/core/src/commit-gate/workspace-commit.ts:43).
   - core TESTS (must also be updated/removed — field is being deleted): packages/core/tests/plays-request.test.ts:122, packages/core/tests/commit-gate.test.ts:187,202 (test name + usage), packages/core/tests/oz-action-scope.test.ts:69,83 (test name + usage).
   - daemon launcher call sites packages/daemon/src/launcher.ts:1335,2144,2260,2384 and its local interface field :2295.
   Remove the field from every interface, every call site, and every test reference so `grep -rn 'commitOnlyScope' packages/ scripts/` returns ZERO hits when done. Remove any now-unused `void opts` / dead branches left from the prior no-op atom.
2. PRESERVE FLAGGING (this is always-commit-AND-FLAG, not commit-and-forget): out-of-lane paths must STILL be surfaced everywhere they were before — in commit receipts (`outOfLane`), store events (`out-of-scope-committed`), and the daemon responses that carried them (oz-action response, support-commit response/`outOfLanePaths`, authoring-Play, deb-response). Only the WITHHOLDING is removed; the visibility flag stays.
3. UPDATE the daemon tests that asserted hold-back so they assert commit-and-flag, and RENAME their misleading titles (no lingering 'HOLDS BACK'/'withholds'/'held back' names). Re-derive the full set with `grep -rniE 'holds? (back|out-of)|withhold|held back' packages/daemon/tests packages/core/tests`. Known: oz-action.test.ts (the out-of-lane file packages/daemon/src/foo.ts must now be COMMITTED and surfaced in outOfLanePaths, NOT left dirty), mutations.test.ts (the two support-commit tests for 0053 and the run_88 regression), authoring-play.test.ts ('holds back files outside the Play write-scope'). Also fix the core test names at commit-gate.test.ts:187 and oz-action-scope.test.ts:69 which still reference the field. Each must now expect the whole changed set committed + out-of-lane flagged.
4. UPDATE the proof harness `scripts/proof-oz-autonomy.mjs` (approx line 64 asserts 'commitOnlyScope lands in-lane paths and holds hard exclusions out of lane') to assert commit-and-flag; run it and paste exit code (must be 0). Do NOT touch `scripts/proof-direct-spine.mjs` (already correct).

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (paste evidence for each):
1. `grep -rn 'commitOnlyScope' packages/ scripts/` returns zero hits (paste before AND after).
2. Out-of-lane paths are still surfaced (flagged) in receipts/events/daemon responses — prove with the updated assertions, not by deleting the flag checks.
3. FULL suites green — run and paste exit codes for: `pnpm --filter @cocoder/core test`, `pnpm --filter @cocoder/daemon test`, `pnpm -r typecheck`.
4. `node scripts/proof-oz-autonomy.mjs` exits 0; `node scripts/proof-direct-spine.mjs` still exits 0 unedited.

WHAT MUST NOT BREAK: do NOT weaken any test into a tautology; the flag/surface assertions must remain real (just flip held-back→committed). Do not edit scripts/proof-direct-spine.mjs. Do not touch docs in this atom (doc + governance alignment is a separate atom). WRITE-SCOPE: packages/core/**, packages/daemon/**, scripts/**. Report the full diff, the before/after grep, and all command exit codes.

ATOM 1 of run_273 — DOC/ADR/GOVERNANCE reconciliation to the restored UNIVERSAL always-commit-and-flag spine (founder Option B, 2026-06-27). Atom 0 deleted `commitOnlyScope` from code; now align the governed docs that still describe the retired PATH/lane withholding as current truth.

CRITICAL DISTINCTION — there are TWO different 'hold back' concepts; only ONE is retired:
  (A) RETIRED: the spine WITHHOLDING out-of-lane/out-of-scope FILES (the `commitOnlyScope` path mechanism). Every current-truth claim that the commit-gate/spine 'holds back' / 'withholds' / leaves dirty the files OUTSIDE a write-scope or lane is now WRONG. The truth: the spine commits the WHOLE changed set and FLAGS out-of-lane paths for visibility (never withheld).
  (B) PRESERVED (DO NOT TOUCH): a persona's HIGH-BREAKAGE-RISK judgment hold-back — Oscar surfacing a genuinely risky change for a founder expand/discard decision. This is a different axis (risk judgment, not path/lane) and is still valid. DO NOT edit these lines: `packages/personas/base/oscar.md:127` ('high-breakage-risk changes are held back and surfaced...') and `packages/personas/base/shared-standards.md:114` ('Hold back only changes that are out of scope or high-risk...'). Leave them exactly as-is.

FILES/LINES TO RECONCILE (re-grep each before editing; line numbers may drift). For ACCEPTED ADRs, ADD a brief superseded-pointer to ADR-0023 Amendment — do NOT rewrite the historical decision text or change its Status. For stale CODE-SYMBOL references (`commitOnlyScope`, `launcher.ts:1022`), correct them to the current behavior since the symbol no longer exists:
  1. cocoder/decisions/0040-oz-write-side-autonomy.md — line ~10 ('`commitOnlyScope` holds back out-of-lane paths') and line ~58 ('any path outside §1 is held back and surfaced'): oz-action now commits the whole changed set and FLAGS `outOfLanePaths`; remove the dead `commitOnlyScope` reference.
  2. cocoder/decisions/0041-orchestration-ownership-and-actor-authority.md — line ~16 ('`commitOnlyScope` withholds'), the Oz table row ~44 ('out-of-lane held back (`launcher.ts:1022`)' — both the 'held back' claim AND the stale `launcher.ts:1022` line ref), and line ~71 ('(oz-action ... support-commit lane) withhold out-of-lane paths'): all reconcile to commit-the-whole-set-and-flag; drop/fix the stale code+line refs.
  3. cocoder/decisions/0025-atomic-authoring-plays.md — line ~48 ('`commitOnlyScope: true` so out-of-scope edits are held back') and ~76 ('out-of-scope held back'): authoring Plays now commit the whole changed set and flag out-of-lane.
  4. cocoder/decisions/0016-deb-scoped-repair-fallback.md §3 — line ~58 ('anything outside ... is held back and surfaced, never silently committed'): Deb repair is a named Option-B caller; it now commits the whole changed set and FLAGS out-of-lane. ALSO: this same paragraph (~line 54) says edits happen 'in the run's worktree' — that is STALE (ADR-0023 Amendment 2 removed worktrees: active checkout only). DO NOT fix the worktree wording in this atom; instead REPORT it in your output so Oscar can file a separate ticket for the worktree-reference defect class.
  5. cocoder/decisions/0036-oscar-deb-repair-dialogue.md — line ~46 ('out-of-scope held back'): reconcile to commit-and-flag.
  6. cocoder/decisions/0007-write-scope-enforcement.md §'Out-of-scope handling — block-the-commit-but-surface-for-approval' (lines ~44-49): this ACCEPTED ADR's body still says out-of-scope changes are 'held back from the commit' and 'stay in the working tree pending the decision'. ADD a short superseded note (matching the style of the existing reconciliation banners in this file) stating that ADR-0023 Amendment (founder directive 2026-06-15) superseded the block-the-commit behavior: scope is advisory, the spine commits the whole changed set and FLAGS out-of-lane paths, never withholds. Do NOT delete or rewrite the original decision text or change the Status line — pointer only.
  7. cocoder/PLAYBOOK.md — line ~48 (Phase-1 historical exit: 'block-but-surface (ADR-0007) ... out-of-scope are held back and surfaced'): this is a dated historical phase record; do NOT rewrite the history. Add a brief parenthetical forward-pointer that ADR-0007's block-the-commit was later superseded by ADR-0023's always-commit-and-flag.
  8. docs/oscar-deb-repair-dialogue-design.md — line ~314 ('edits are held back', citing ADR-0016): reconcile to commit-and-flag consistent with #4.
  9. packages/personas/base/deb.md — line ~82 ('The commit-gate holds back and surfaces anything outside the active scope'): the commit-gate now COMMITS the whole changed set and FLAGS out-of-lane paths. (The surrounding rule that Deb's only autonomous commit is a non-interfering `.md` self-fix, and that the daemon refuses interfering non-`.md` commits, STAYS — only the 'holds back out-of-scope' clause changes to commit-and-flag.)
  10. packages/personas/base/oz.md — lines ~25-31 (oz-repair: 'gate-commits only the allowed ... paths'; 'Machinery code, product code, ... propose-only: the daemon leaves them dirty, names them as held back, and waits for founder review'): oz-repair is a named Option-B caller — it now commits the whole changed set and FLAGS out-of-lane paths for visibility rather than leaving them dirty/withheld. Preserve the rest (failed repair commits nothing; a repair never rescues/relaunches/mutates an in-flight run; Refresh Oz after).

LEAVE UNCHANGED (already correct — do not touch): ARCHITECTURE.md (already says 'advisory and never suppresses a commit'); docs/orchestration-contract-ownership.md:183,259 (describe withholding as the REMOVED anti-pattern); docs/oz-improvement-routing.md:44 ('does not withhold commits'); docs/phase3-cross-doc-reverification.md (audit inventory = current truth); docs/founder-brief-format-durability.md:23,29 (historical run_78/79 incident quotes); cocoder/decisions/0035 + base/plays/create-priority.md (those 'withhold' refer to withholding a PRIORITY, unrelated). And the (B) judgment-hold-back lines named above.

ALSO confirm (state in your report, with file:line evidence) that ADR-0007 and ADR-0023 now AGREE with each other and with the restored code: both describe write-scope as advisory and the spine as always-commit-and-flag.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (paste evidence):
1. Defect-class grep `grep -rniE 'commitOnlyScope|holds? back|withhold|held back' packages/personas/base cocoder/decisions cocoder/PLAYBOOK.md docs/oscar-deb-repair-dialogue-design.md` returns ZERO current-truth path-withholding claims — the ONLY remaining hits are the preserved (B) judgment-hold-back lines (oscar.md:127, shared-standards.md:114), the already-correct 'does not withhold'/'anti-pattern we removed' lines, historical-incident quotes, and the unrelated priority-withholding lines. List every remaining hit and classify it.
2. `pnpm --filter @cocoder/personas test` green (base-personas.test.ts) — paste exit code.
3. `pnpm -r typecheck` green — paste exit code.
4. Each ACCEPTED ADR (0007) keeps its original Status + decision text; reconciliation is an ADDED pointer, not a rewrite. Show the added lines.
5. Report (do not fix) the ADR-0016 §3 stale 'worktree' reference for a follow-up ticket.

WHAT MUST NOT BREAK / WRITE-SCOPE: cocoder/decisions/**, cocoder/PLAYBOOK.md, docs/**, packages/personas/base/**. Do NOT edit ARCHITECTURE.md, the (B) judgment-hold-back lines, cocoder/standards/**, or any code under packages/{core,daemon}/src. base/** edits must still teach the role with repo-specific nouns stripped (ADR-0012 portability) — keep them role-general. Report the full diff, the before/after defect-class grep, and all command exit codes.
